body:
## Summary

This PR fixes the issue where the `/merge` command was getting stuck after displaying "Found 3 PRs with 'ready' label. Starting merge process..." without completing any merges (even after 10-12 hours).

## Root Cause Analysis

The issue was caused by several interconnected problems:

1. **Fire-and-forget promise with silent error swallowing** - The `processor.run()` call was not properly awaited, and errors were only logged in verbose mode, leaving users with a stuck message when failures occurred

2. **Silent exception swallowing in callbacks** - `onProgress`, `onComplete`, and `onError` callbacks caught all exceptions but only logged them when `VERBOSE` was enabled

3. **Missing timeout for onStatusUpdate callback** - If Telegram API or network hung, the entire CI polling in `waitForCI` would block indefinitely

4. **No user notification on queue failures** - When the queue crashed, users had no indication except for a stuck message

## Changes

### Error Handling Improvements
- Always log errors (not just in verbose mode) for critical failures using `[ERROR]` prefix
- Always notify users via Telegram message when merge queue fails unexpectedly
- Add timeout wrapper (60s default) for `onStatusUpdate` callback to prevent infinite blocking
- Add error handling for CI check failures in `waitForCI` loop (continue polling instead of crashing)

### User Feedback Improvements (Issue #1269 - PR Comment Feedback)
- **Show errors inline in progress message** - When individual PR merges fail, the error is now displayed immediately in the progress message (where the cancel button is visible), giving users immediate feedback
- **Add dismiss button for failed queue** - When the entire queue fails, a "Failed - Click to dismiss" button is shown so users can acknowledge the error
- Error messages are escaped for MarkdownV2 and truncated to 60 chars if too long

### Documentation
- Add comprehensive case study documentation in `docs/case-studies/issue-1269/`

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests pass (`npm test` - all 186+ tests pass)
- [x] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [x] Format check passes (`npm run format:check`)
- [x] Added tests for inline error display functionality
- [ ] Run `/merge` command on a repository with PRs having the `ready` label
- [ ] Verify merge queue processes PRs correctly
- [ ] Test error scenarios (e.g., CI failure, network timeout) to verify user gets error notification in the message with cancel button
- [ ] Verify error logs are written even without `--verbose` flag
- [ ] Check that callback timeout prevents infinite blocking

## Related Research

The root cause analysis was informed by:
- [Telegraf Discussion #1234: Long polling silently hangs](https://github.com/telegraf/telegraf/discussions/1234)
- [Telegraf Issue #1479: Promise timeout after 90000ms](https://github.com/telegraf/telegraf/issues/1479)
- [Node.js async queue patterns research](https://github.com/sindresorhus/p-queue)

Fixes #1269

---

title: fix: improve merge queue error handling and debugging (Issue #1269)
